rawIntent:
[Feature: Build the leave management module — Phase 6: Scaffold leave-management module and define ILeaveManagementService interface]

Create src/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.interface.ts with ILeaveManagementService interface declaring methods: applyForLeave(dto: CreateLeaveRequestDto): Promise<LeaveRequest>; approveLeave(leaveId: string, approverId: string, comment?: string): Promise<LeaveRequest>; rejectLeave(leaveId: string, approverId: string, comment: string): Promise<LeaveRequest>; cancelLeave(leaveId: string, employeeId: string): Promise<LeaveRequest>; discardDraft(leaveId: string, employeeId: string): Promise<void>; getLeaveBalance(employeeId: string, leaveTypeId: string, year: number): Promise<LeaveBalance>; getLeaveHistory(employeeId: string): Promise<LeaveRequest[]>. Create src/modules/leave-management/index.ts as barrel export. Depends on src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts from Phase 3, src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts from Phase 4, and src/modules/leave-type/leave-type.model.ts from Phase 1 for type imports.

Phase architecture notes:
Public API contract for the leave management orchestration.

Detailed phase architecture (architecture-agent):

## Canonical dependencies for this phase

Note: this list supersedes any dependency names in the intent
text above. Do not emit ambiguity for mismatches.

The per-phase architecture above is the AUTHORITATIVE source
for the dependency list this phase must implement. The exact
set of types, abstractions, and references defined or used by
this phase is:

- ILeaveManagementService
- LeaveRequest
- CreateLeaveRequestDto
- LeaveBalance

Treat this list as complete. If additional dependencies appear
in the architecture but the planner's scope text mentions a
partial subset, do NOT flag this as ambiguity — the per-phase

## Deferred to later phases
The following concerns are intentionally OUT OF SCOPE for this phase and will be addressed in subsequent phases:
- Phase 7 — Implement applyForLeave use case: Create src/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.ts implementing ILeaveManagementService
- Phase 8 — Implement approve and reject use cases: Add approveLeave and rejectLeave methods to src/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.ts
- Phase 9 — Implement cancel leave, discard draft, and balance recalculation: Add cancelLeave and discardDraft methods to src/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.ts
- Phase 10 — Integrate audit logging, RBAC enforcement, and read operations: Modify src/modules/leave-management/leave-management.service.ts to inject IAuditService and enforce

successCriteria.description: ILeaveManagementService defines applyForLeave, approveLeave, rejectLeave, cancelLeave, discardDraft, getLeaveBalance, getLeaveHistory with correct signatures
All method signatures reference existing types from src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts and src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts
No circular dependencies introduced (leave-management depends on leave and balance, which do not depend on leave-management)

constraints: No circular dependencies: leave-management may import from leave and balance, but not vice versa
Interface must use exact type names: LeaveRequest, CreateLeaveRequestDto, LeaveBalance as defined in the canonical dependencies
Barrel export file must re-export only ILeaveManagementService
outOfScope: Audit logging, RBAC enforcement, input validation, error handling (deferred to Phase 10)
Any database access or repository patterns
Any modifications to existing modules (leave, balance, employee, policy, notification)
